prompt: Run a full document lint on the portfolio. I want to see everything — type issues, missing links, orphans, the works.

assertions.description: Report covers type drift, unlinked people references, and orphaned documents
assertions.check: output contains sections or findings for all three check categories

assertions.description: Identifies the Milestone Map research mistype and other type-content mismatches
assertions.check: output flags at least the 10 Milestone Map files as mistyped

assertions.description: Detects plain-text people references that should be markdown links
assertions.check: output identifies unlinked people references with counts and proposes link syntax fixes

assertions.description: Identifies documents not referenced from any index.md
assertions.check: output reports orphaned files and identifies root causes (e.g. missing Initiatives/index.md)

assertions.description: Output follows the structured report format with Fixed/Needs Review sections
assertions.check: output contains a summary table or structured report with actionable fix categories
